headline: Is Equity Residential Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: Equity Residential has underperformed the Dow over the past year, but analysts are cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Blackstone is a major seller in January commercial real estate deals
summary: Blackstone appears to be rebalancing its real estate investment trust portfolio, selling off legacy holdings.
